name: Tempeh Chickpea Stuffed Mini Peppers
method: Cut off the stem end of the peppers. Slice lengthwise. Remove any seeds that are inside. Set aside.
Place all the remaining ingredients in a food processor. Pulse four or five times. The chickpeas should be chunky. Remove the blade and stir to make sure the mixture is blended well.
Stuff each pepper half full with about 2 tablespoons of the chickpea mixture. Set on a plate to serve.
